game.title: Campus Safe
menu.subtitle: Campus stealth survival education level (Phase 1)
menu.help: Arrow keys to switch, Enter to confirm, F11 fullscreen
ui.menu_step_1: 1. Learn the board and stair connections first.
ui.menu_step_2: 2. After alert, trust official updates instead of rumor.
ui.menu_step_3: 3. Plan a gate route, tunnel route, and hold route together.
objective.explore: Learn map boards and stairs first, then build three viable escape routes.
status.controls: WASD Move  E Interact  Q Throw Bottle  Tab Comms  M Board Map  J Log
ui.log_controls: J or Esc to close. Arrows / PgUp / PgDn for older messages.
ui.pause_help: Esc resume, L language, T subtitles, H high contrast, F11 fullscreen.
ui.pause_focus_hint: Use Arrow keys + Enter, or click with mouse.
ui.opening_copy_map: Confirm your current floor and stair links from an in-scene board.
ui.opening_copy_notice: Sync official updates through broadcasts or the phone channel, not rumor.
ui.opening_copy_safe: Favor interior, shielded, lockable spaces over open or glass-heavy zones.
ui.map_route_current_scene: You are already in target scene
ui.map_legend_link: Blue door blocks: scene links (red means blocked)
ui.map_gate_status_move: Move to outdoor north gate first
ui.map_access_denied: No map board nearby. You cannot open the map here.
ui.map_access_hint: Move to a scene map board and press M.
ui.map_opened: You opened the local scene map.
ui.throw_bottle_result: Noise created. Use it to pull patrol away.
ui.bottle_hint: Find supply boxes or switch to a lower-exposure route.
ui.link_blocked: This link is blocked in the current alert wave.
ui.link_blocked_hint: Try a stair detour or another building path.
ui.secret_need_clues: Not enough clues to open the tunnel.
ui.safe_room_no: This area does not meet full shelter criteria.
ui.exit_blocked: North gate is currently covered by guard patrol.
ui.exit_blocked_guardline: Guard has direct visual coverage on the gate route.
ui.exit_blocked_noise: Guard is not displaced yet. The gate timing is unsafe.
ui.exit_not_in_gate_scene: You are not at the north-gate scene.
ui.exit_blocked_hint: Create a noise offset before trying the gate.
ui.chase_broadcast_hint: At least one raider spotted you. Other patrols are converging.
system.opening_done: Opening complete. You can move now.
interaction.library_help_desk_sync: Sync official update at help desk
robot.guide.hint: Floor detours are safer than front-route confrontation. Confirm your floor first.
robot.service.hint: I create periodic noise. You can cross high-risk lanes during that window.
robot.security.hint: I can announce nearby risk zones but cannot route for you.
opening.1.title: You just completed orientation check-in
opening.1.body: The guide robot asks you to learn map boards and stairs first. The campus looks calm, but this drill is about route judgment under sudden pressure.
opening.2.title: You start with routine exploration
opening.2.body: Switch between outdoor, library, and student center. Confirm lockable rooms, glass exposure zones, and collect key clues.
opening.3.title: Emergency event is about to trigger
opening.3.body: North gate is high-risk due to guard coverage. You can lure and force exit, unlock a secret tunnel via clues, or hold until police arrival.
alert.wave1.title: Official Alert: serious security event near north student center
alert.wave1.body: Leave open areas now and confirm official instructions. Main student-center connection is restricted; use library or floor detours.
alert.wave2.title: Official Update: keep low exposure and prepare to shelter
alert.wave2.body: Some floor links are blocked. Prioritize lockable inner spaces and avoid glass atriums and open bridges.
alert.wave3.title: Police arrived: all-clear stage
alert.wave3.body: You may complete the run and review route decisions.
action_result.map_board: You used a map board and improved scene awareness.
action_result.broadcast: You confirmed updates through official broadcast.
action_result.phone_sync: You synchronized with an official channel.
action_result.safe_room_check: You checked shelter qualification for this area.
debrief.subtitle: Focus on route reasoning, not spectacle.
debrief.note.alert_first: Confirm official updates before route changes.
debrief.note.bottle_timing: Bottle use is timing control, not combat.
debrief.note.multi_floor_route: Multi-floor detours are often safer than frontal lanes.
debrief.note.secret_clues: Secret route depends on complete clue chain.
check.opening_map_board: Read at least one map board
check.opening_stairs: Complete at least one floor transition
check.alert_use_bottle: Use bottle lure at least once
check.shelter_find_safe_room: Hold in a qualified shelter area
check.all_clear_resolve: Finish an ending and read debrief
feedback.ending.exit_gate: You extracted through the main gate. Timing was the critical factor.
feedback.ending.secret_tunnel: You extracted through the secret tunnel. Clue chain execution worked.
feedback.ending.police_arrival: You held until police arrival. Shelter stability was strong.
feedback.ending.failed: Run failed. Review the failure node and retry.
feedback.capture.good: You controlled enemy sight and hearing windows.
feedback.capture.bad: You entered sustained pursuit range and were captured.
feedback.clue.good: Clue chain was complete and route information was sufficient.
feedback.clue.bad: Insufficient clues restricted your escape options.
feedback.bottle.bad: No effective lure window was created this run.
feedback.alert.good: You did not ignore official updates.
success.exit_gate: You caught a guard-offset window and escaped via north gate.
success.secret_tunnel: You unlocked and used the secret tunnel successfully.
success.police_arrival: You held until police took control. Mission complete.
failure.captured: You were captured after sustained pursuit.
failure.high_risk_area: You stayed exposed in a high-risk area too long.
failure.reverse_risk: You returned to high-risk exposure after confirming shelter.
term.emergency_alert.title: Official Emergency Alert
term.emergency_alert.body: In this level, official broadcast and terminal updates outrank all rumor.
term.official_sources.title: Official Sources
term.official_sources.body: Broadcast, staffed desks, blue-light reporting flow, and formal alert systems.
term.secure_room.title: Qualified Shelter Space
term.secure_room.body: Lockable, out-of-sight, not a public corridor, and not large-glass exposed.
term.situational_awareness.title: Situational Awareness
term.situational_awareness.body: Continuously track building, floor, room, and link states.
term.route_planning.title: Route Planning
term.route_planning.body: Main gate, tunnel, and police-arrival endings all depend on route planning.
term.decoy_noise.title: Noise Lure
term.decoy_noise.body: Bottles and robot noise can shift patrol paths temporarily.
term.multi_floor_navigation.title: Multi-floor Navigation
term.multi_floor_navigation.body: Stair transitions help bypass blocked links.
term.robot_guidance.title: Robot Guidance
term.robot_guidance.body: Guide and service robots provide exploitable timing and information.
